description: An employee needs to request a leave of absence under the Family and Medical Leave Act (FMLA).

nodes.task_description: Receive the leave request and determine the employee's eligibility for FMLA.

expected_outcome.value: Leave specialist verifies the employee has worked the required hours and tenure.

nodes.task_description: Provide the employee with the required FMLA paperwork, including the medical certification form.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist sends the official FMLA packet to the employee.

nodes.task_description: Once the completed certification is returned, approve the leave in the HRIS and inform the employee and their manager of the terms.

expected_outcome.value: Specialist approves the leave and communicates the start and end dates.
